tastes.text: Intricate asymmetric patterns with heavy use of color

iterations.baseCode: FD 100

variants.code: FD 100
variants.reason: A single plain line has almost no intricacy, asymmetry, or color richness despite being very concise.

variants.code:
CS
SETBG BLACK
SETPENSIZE 2
SETPC GOLD
FD 100
REPEAT 18 [
  SETPC (PICK [RED ORANGE GOLD LIME CYAN SKYBLUE MAGENTA VIOLET])
  FD 100
  RT 137
  FD 42
  LT 78
  SETPC (PICK [TEAL MINT ROSE AMBER PURPLE CORAL WHITE])
  FD 68
  BK 34
  RT 23
]
variants.reason: The black background, many bright pen colors, and jagged off-kilter radial structure create a vivid intricate pattern that fits the taste well.

TO STAR :r

TO ZIG :r
REPEAT 3 [
  FD :r RT 55 FD (:r / 2)
  PU BK (:r / 2) LT 55 BK :r PD
  LT 35 FD (:r / 2)
  PU BK (:r / 2) RT 35 PD
]
END

TO TIP :r
IFELSE (RANDOM 2) = 0 [STAR :r] [ZIG :r]
END

TO BRANCH :n :len
IF :n < 1 [TIP 4 STOP]
REPEAT 4 [

  MAKE "ang (12 + RANDOM 58 + REPCOUNT * 7 - :n * 2)

  FD (:len * (10 - REPCOUNT) / 9)

  BRANCH (:n - 1) (:len * (52 + RANDOM 18) / 100)
  PU BK (:len * (10 - REPCOUNT) / 9) LT :ang PD
]
END

PU SETXY -120 -158 PD
SETHEADING 7
REPEAT 13 [
  MAKE "i REPCOUNT
  MAKE "rad (34 + :i * 15)
  SETPC (ITEM (1 + MOD :i 16) [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER PURPLE])
  SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:rad / 43)))
  REPEAT 3 [
    FD (40 + :i * 4)
    MAKE "c (-105 + RANDOM 211) MAKE "s (20 + RANDOM 64)
    MAKE "d (12 + RANDOM 138) MAKE "t (14 + RANDOM 56)
    SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER])
    SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT ((:rad + :s) / 52)))
    RT :c FD :s
    BRANCH 3 (14 + :i * 2)
    TIP (3 + RANDOM 7)
    LT :d FD :t
    BRANCH 2 (12 + RANDOM 27)
    PU BK :t RT :d BK :s LT :c PD
  ]
  SETPENSIZE (MAX 2 (INT (:rad / 36)))
  SETPC (ITEM (1 + MOD (:i + 5) 16) [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER PURPLE])
  FD (38 + :i * 6)
  BRANCH 4 (18 + :i * 3)
  REPEAT 5 [
    MAKE "q (-92 + RANDOM 185) MAKE "u (10 + RANDOM 32)
    SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:rad / 68)))
    SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT CORAL])
    RT :q FD :u TIP (2 + RANDOM 7)
    PU BK :u LT :q PD
  ]
  RT (16 + RANDOM 38 + :i)
  MAKE "stride (36 + :i * 11)
  IFELSE (MOD :i 7) = 0 [SETPC (PICK [CORAL AMBER WHITE SKYBLUE]) FD (:stride * 135 / 100)] [FD :stride]
  BRANCH 3 (22 + :i * 2)
  LT (84 - :i + RANDOM 27)
  SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:rad / 49)))
  REPEAT 5 [
    SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL])
    MAKE "base (25 + :i * 9)
    IFELSE (MOD REPCOUNT 5) = 0 [FD (:base * 135 / 100) SETPC (PICK [AMBER CORAL MAGENTA WHITE])] [FD :base]
    BRANCH 2 (10 + REPCOUNT * 7)
    TIP (3 + RANDOM 7)
    RT (88 + REPCOUNT * 13 + :i)
  ]
  SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:rad / 72)))
  REPEAT 8 [
    MAKE "a (-130 + RANDOM 261) MAKE "b (-80 + RANDOM 161)
    MAKE "l (16 + RANDOM 62) MAKE "m (10 + RANDOM 48)
    SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER])
    RT :a FD :l BRANCH 2 (8 + RANDOM 26)
    RT :b FD :m TIP (2 + RANDOM 8)
    PU BK :m LT :b BK :l LT :a PD
  ]
  PU BK (62 + :i * 6) RT (29 + :i * 9) PD
]
SETPC WHITE
SETPENSIZE 6
FD 230
iterations.feedback: Add a larger step increase every 12 to 16 spokes so the outer spiral arms extend farther from the center, creating more negative space between line clusters while preserving the multicolor asymmetry.
iterations.fbCriticism: The image is still dominated by a very dense central cluster, so many of the colored line interactions blur together and reduce legibility.

iterations.baseCode:
TO STAR :r
REPEAT 5 [FD :r RT 144]
END

TO ZIG :r
REPEAT 3 [FD :r RT 55 FD (:r / 2) PU BK (:r / 2) LT 55 BK :r PD LT 35 FD (:r / 2) PU BK (:r / 2) RT 35 PD]
END

TO TIP :r
SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER PURPLE])
IFELSE (RANDOM 2) = 0 [STAR :r] [ZIG :r]
END

TO BRANCH :n :len
IF :n < 1 [TIP 4 STOP]
REPEAT 4 [
  SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER])
  SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:len / 8)))
  MAKE "ang (8 + RANDOM 78 + REPCOUNT * 11 - :n * 4)
  MAKE "seg (:len * (11 - REPCOUNT) / 9)
  IFELSE (MOD (REPCOUNT + :n) 5) = 0 [MAKE "go (:seg * 135 / 100) SETPC (PICK [CORAL AMBER SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME WHITE])] [MAKE "go :seg]
  RT :ang FD :go
  IF :n < 3 [TIP (3 + :n)]
  BRANCH (:n - 1) (:len * (46 + RANDOM 30) / 100)
  PU BK :go LT :ang PD
]
END

MAKE "stride (36 + :i * 12)

The outer spirographic star lattice remains very similar to the previous version, while the irregular cyan-white looping ring is slightly repositioned and better integrated. This helps the heavy-color, intricate aesthetic, but the change is incremental rather than dramatically new.

IFELSE (MOD REPCOUNT 4) = 0 [FD (:base * 155 / 100) SETPC (PICK [AMBER CORAL MAGENTA WHITE SILVER])] [FD :base]
BRANCH 2 (10 + REPCOUNT * 7) TIP (3 + RANDOM 8)
RT (83 + REPCOUNT * 14 + :i)
]
SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:rad / 68)))
REPEAT 8 [
MAKE "a (-150 + RANDOM 301) MAKE "b (-90 + RANDOM 181)
MAKE "l (14 + RANDOM 72) MAKE "m (8 + RANDOM 55)
SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER SILVER])
RT :a FD (:l + 5 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 17)) BRANCH 2 (8 + RANDOM 30)
RT :b FD :m TIP (2 + RANDOM 8)
PU BK :m LT :b BK (:l + 5 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 17)) LT :a PD
]
PU BK (56 + :i * 7 + 5 * SIN (:i * 17)) RT (25 + :i * 10) PD
]
SETPC WHITE
SETPENSIZE 6
FD 250

REPEAT 5 [SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER PURPLE SILVER]) FD :r RT 144]
END

TO ZIG :r
REPEAT 3 [SETPC (PICK [GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER SILVER]) FD (:r + 3 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 29)) RT 55 FD (:r / 2) PU BK (:r / 2) LT 55 BK (:r + 3 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 29)) PD LT 35 FD (:r / 2) PU BK (:r / 2) RT 35 PD]
END

TO TIP :r
SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER PURPLE SILVER])

TO BRANCH :n :len
IF :n < 1 [TIP 4 STOP]
REPEAT 4 [
SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER SILVER])
SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:len / 8)))
MAKE "ang (3 + RANDOM 92 + REPCOUNT * 13 - :n * 5)
MAKE "seg (:len * (12 - REPCOUNT) / 9)
MAKE "wig (5 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 17 + :n * 23))
IFELSE (MOD (REPCOUNT + :n) 4) = 0 [MAKE "go (:seg * 158 / 100 + :wig) SETPC (PICK [CORAL AMBER SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME WHITE SILVER])] [MAKE "go (:seg + :wig)]
RT :ang FD :go
IF :n < 3 [TIP (3 + :n)]
BRANCH (:n - 1) (:len * (42 + RANDOM 39) / 100)
PU BK :go LT :ang PD
]
END

SETBG [2 0 31]
PU SETXY -8 6 PD
REPEAT 22 [
SETHEADING (REPCOUNT * 31 + RANDOM 15 + 4 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 17))
MAKE "core (12 + RANDOM 38 + 5 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 17))
SETPC (PICK [SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER GOLD SILVER])
SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:core / 13)))
FD :core TIP (2 + RANDOM 5) BRANCH 1 (8 + RANDOM 14)
PU BK :core PD
]
PU SETXY 34 -24 PD
SETHEADING 9
REPEAT 16 [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
MAKE "rad (28 + :i * 17 + 5 * SIN (:i * 17))
SETPC (ITEM (1 + MOD (:i + 3) 17) [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER PURPLE SILVER])
SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:rad / 40)))
REPEAT 3 [
FD (35 + :i * 6 + 5 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 17 + :i))
MAKE "c (-130 + RANDOM 261) MAKE "s (18 + RANDOM 82)
MAKE "d (8 + RANDOM 158) MAKE "t (12 + RANDOM 66)
SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER SILVER])
SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT ((:rad + :s) / 48)))
RT :c FD (:s + 5 * SIN (:i * 17)) BRANCH 3 (13 + :i * 2) TIP (3 + RANDOM 8)
LT :d FD :t BRANCH 2 (12 + RANDOM 32)
PU BK :t RT :d BK (:s + 5 * SIN (:i * 17)) LT :c PD
]
SETPENSIZE (MAX 2 (INT (:rad / 34)))
SETPC (ITEM (1 + MOD (:i + 7) 17) [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER PURPLE SILVER])
FD (34 + :i * 7 + 5 * SIN (:i * 17))
BRANCH 4 (17 + :i * 3)
REPEAT 6 [
MAKE "q (-110 + RANDOM 221) MAKE "u (9 + RANDOM 39)
SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:rad / 64)))
SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT CORAL SILVER])
RT :q FD (:u + 3 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 31)) TIP (2 + RANDOM 8)
PU BK (:u + 3 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 31)) LT :q PD
]
RT (12 + RANDOM 50 + :i + 8 * SIN (:i * 19))
MAKE "stride (32 + :i * 13 + 5 * SIN (:i * 17))
IFELSE (MOD :i 5) = 0 [SETPC (PICK [WHITE AMBER SKYBLUE CORAL SILVER]) SETPENSIZE (MAX 3 (INT (:rad / 24))) FD (:stride * 210 / 100) PU FD 15 PD] [IFELSE (MOD :i 7) = 0 [SETPC (PICK [CORAL AMBER WHITE SKYBLUE MAGENTA]) FD (:stride * 150 / 100)] [FD :stride]]
BRANCH 3 (22 + :i * 2)
LT (76 - :i + RANDOM 37)
SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 (INT (:rad / 48)))

SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL SILVER])
MAKE "base (23 + :i * 10 + 5 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 17))

BRANCH 2 (10 + REPCOUNT * 7) TIP (3 + RANDOM 8)
RT (83 + REPCOUNT * 14 + :i)
]

MAKE "a (-150 + RANDOM 301) MAKE "b (-90 + RANDOM 181)

SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE CRIMSON MINT ROSE CORAL AMBER SILVER])

RT :b FD :m TIP (2 + RANDOM 8)
PU BK :m LT :b BK (:l + 5 * SIN (REPCOUNT * 17)) LT :a PD
]
PU BK (56 + :i * 7 + 5 * SIN (:i * 17)) RT (25 + :i * 10) PD
]
SETPC WHITE

runs.peakCode:
TO STAR :r
REPEAT 5 [FD :r RT 144]
END

TO ZIG :r
REPEAT 3 [
  FD :r RT 55 FD (:r / 2)
  PU BK (:r / 2) LT 55 BK :r PD
  LT 35 FD (:r / 2)
  PU BK (:r / 2) RT 35 PD
]
END

TO TIP :r
IFELSE (RANDOM 2) = 0 [STAR :r] [ZIG :r]
END

TO BRANCH :n :len
IF :n < 1 [TIP 4 STOP]
REPEAT 4 [
  SETPC (PICK [RED GOLD SKYBLUE MAGENTA LIME CYAN ORANGE VIOLET TEAL WHITE])
  SETPENSIZE (MAX 1 :n)
  MAKE "ang (12 + RANDOM 58 + REPCOUNT * 7 - :n * 2)
  RT :ang
  FD (:len * (10 - REPCOUNT) / 9)
  IF :n < 3 [TIP (3 + :n)]
  BRANCH (:n - 1) (:len * (52 + RANDOM 18) / 100)
  PU BK (:len * (10 - REPCOUNT) / 9) LT :ang PD
]
END

This strongly helps the stated taste for intricate asymmetric patterns and heavy use of color, creating far more visual energy and complexity.

baselines.code:
TO RGB :A
  SETPC (LIST (ROUND (128 + (127 * SIN :A))) (ROUND (128 + (127 * SIN (:A + 120)))) (ROUND (128 + (127 * SIN (:A + 240)))))
END

TO MOVE :X :Y
  PU
  SETXY :X :Y
  PD
END

TO PETAL :R :A
  REPEAT 2 [
    ARC :A :R
    RT (180 - :A)
  ]
END

TO ROSETTE :X :Y :N :R :A :PHASE :TILT
  MOVE :X :Y

baselines.code:
TO HUE :k :r :g :b
SETPC (LIST (REMAINDER (:r + :k * 31) 256) (REMAINDER (:g + :k * 47) 256) (REMAINDER (:b + :k * 67) 256))
END

TO JUMP :x :y :h
PU
SETXY :x :y
SETHEADING :h
PD
END

TO GLOW :x :y :rings :rad :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y 0
REPEAT :rings [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
HUE :i :r :g :b
MAKE "w 1 + (REMAINDER :i 3)
SETPW :w
CIRCLE (:rad + :i * 5)
RT 17
]
END

TO RIBBON :x :y :h :n :step :swell :spin :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y :h
REPEAT :n [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
HUE :i :r :g :b
MAKE "w 1 + (REMAINDER (:i + 2) 6)
SETPW :w
FD (:step + :i * :swell)
MAKE "ang 62 + (REMAINDER (:i * 11) 132)
MAKE "rad 6 + :i * .42
ARC :ang :rad
RT (:spin + (REMAINDER (:i * 19) 43))
MAKE "cr 1 + (REMAINDER (:i * 5) 11)
CIRCLE :cr
]
END

TO BURST :x :y :h :arms :len :r :g :b
REPEAT :arms [
MAKE "a REPCOUNT
JUMP :x :y (:h + :a * 137.507 + (REMAINDER (:a * 19) 47))
HUE :a :r :g :b
MAKE "w 1 + (REMAINDER (:a + 3) 7)
SETPW :w
MAKE "reach :len * (.55 + (REMAINDER (:a * 7) 13) / 12)
FD (:reach * .14)
MAKE "ang1 48 + (REMAINDER (:a * 23) 150)
MAKE "rad1 10 + (REMAINDER (:a * 17) 58)
ARC :ang1 :rad1
RT (21 + (REMAINDER (:a * 29) 71))
FD (:reach * .11)
MAKE "ang2 80 + (REMAINDER (:a * 31) 180)
MAKE "rad2 5 + (REMAINDER (:a * 13) 38)
ARC :ang2 :rad2
LT (63 + (REMAINDER (:a * 37) 91))
FD (:reach * .08)
CIRCLE (2 + (REMAINDER (:a * 5) 20))
]
END

TO LACE :x :y :h :rows :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y :h
REPEAT :rows [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
HUE :i :r :g :b
MAKE "w 1 + (REMAINDER :i 4)
SETPW :w
REPEAT 5 [
FD (10 + :i * .72)
ARC (54 + (REMAINDER (:i * 7) 37)) (5 + :i * .28)
LT 143
]
RT (18 + (REMAINDER (:i * 13) 59))
PU
FD (4 + :i * .31)
PD
]
END

TO CONSTELLATION :x :y :h :n :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y :h
REPEAT :n [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
HUE :i :r :g :b
SETPW 1
PU
FD (12 + (REMAINDER (:i * 29) 180))
RT (39 + (REMAINDER (:i * 17) 119))
PD
CIRCLE (1 + (REMAINDER (:i * 3) 8))
ARC (120 + (REMAINDER (:i * 23) 210)) (3 + (REMAINDER (:i * 5) 23))
PU
BK (8 + (REMAINDER (:i * 11) 44))
PD
]
END

TO NET :x :y :h :loops :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y :h
REPEAT :loops [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
HUE :i :r :g :b
SETPW 1
REPEAT 7 [
FD (15 + :i * .9)
ARC (42 + (REMAINDER (:i * 9) 86)) (7 + :i * .25)
RT (91 + (REMAINDER (:i * 5) 37))
]
RT (26 + (REMAINDER (:i * 15) 61))
PU
FD (5 + :i * .22)
PD
]
END

TO HUE :k :r :g :b
SETPC (LIST (REMAINDER (:r + :k * 31) 256) (REMAINDER (:g + :k * 47) 256) (REMAINDER (:b + :k * 67) 256))
END

TO JUMP :x :y :h
PU
SETXY :x :y
SETHEADING :h
PD
END

TO GLOW :x :y :rings :rad :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y 0
REPEAT :rings [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
HUE :i :r :g :b
MAKE "w 1 + (REMAINDER :i 3)
SETPW :w
CIRCLE (:rad + :i * 5)
RT 17
]
END

TO RIBBON :x :y :h :n :step :swell :spin :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y :h
REPEAT :n [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
HUE :i :r :g :b
MAKE "w 1 + (REMAINDER (:i + 2) 6)
SETPW :w
FD (:step + :i * :swell)
MAKE "ang 62 + (REMAINDER (:i * 11) 132)
MAKE "rad 6 + :i * .42
ARC :ang :rad
RT (:spin + (REMAINDER (:i * 19) 43))
MAKE "cr 1 + (REMAINDER (:i * 5) 11)
CIRCLE :cr
]
END

TO BURST :x :y :h :arms :len :r :g :b
REPEAT :arms [
MAKE "a REPCOUNT
JUMP :x :y (:h + :a * 137.507 + (REMAINDER (:a * 19) 47))
HUE :a :r :g :b
MAKE "w 1 + (REMAINDER (:a + 3) 7)
SETPW :w
MAKE "reach :len * (.55 + (REMAINDER (:a * 7) 13) / 12)
FD (:reach * .14)
MAKE "ang1 48 + (REMAINDER (:a * 23) 150)
MAKE "rad1 10 + (REMAINDER (:a * 17) 58)
ARC :ang1 :rad1
RT (21 + (REMAINDER (:a * 29) 71))
FD (:reach * .11)
MAKE "ang2 80 + (REMAINDER (:a * 31) 180)
MAKE "rad2 5 + (REMAINDER (:a * 13) 38)
ARC :ang2 :rad2
LT (63 + (REMAINDER (:a * 37) 91))
FD (:reach * .08)
CIRCLE (2 + (REMAINDER (:a * 5) 20))
]
END

TO LACE :x :y :h :rows :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y :h
REPEAT :rows [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
HUE :i :r :g :b
MAKE "w 1 + (REMAINDER :i 4)
SETPW :w
REPEAT 5 [

ARC (54 + (REMAINDER (:i * 7) 37)) (5 + :i * .28)
LT 143
]
RT (18 + (REMAINDER (:i * 13) 59))
PU
FD (4 + :i * .31)
PD
]
END

SETPW 1

PD

]

TO NET :x :y :h :loops :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y :h

MAKE "i REPCOUNT

HUE :i :r :g :b

SETPW :w
CIRCLE (:rad + :i * 5)

]
END

TO RIBBON :x :y :h :n :step :swell :spin :r :g :b
JUMP :x :y :h
REPEAT :n [
MAKE "i REPCOUNT
HUE :i :r :g :b
MAKE "w 1 + (REMAINDER (:i + 2) 6)
SETPW :w
FD (:step + :i * :swell)
MAKE "ang 62 + (REMAINDER (:i * 11) 132)
MAKE "rad 6 + :i * .42
ARC :ang :rad
RT (:spin + (REMAINDER (:i * 19) 43))
MAKE "cr 1 + (REMAINDER (:i * 5) 11)
CIRCLE :cr
]
END
